DEFT TO PAY ARREARS OF $1,600.00 AS FOLLOWS: $700.00 TODAY; $800.00 ON 9/20/01,THROUGH THE JEWISH FOUN- DATION, AND $100.00 PER MONTH, FOR 12 MONTHS, ON THE FIRST OF EACH MONTH, COMMENCING 9/1/01, IN ADDITION TO KEEPING RENT CURRENT. IF PAYMENT OF RENT OR ABOVE ARREARAGE PAYMENTS NOT KEPT CURRENT, PLTF MAY SEEK JUDGMENT EX PARTE ON 24 HRS NOTICE TO DEFT. PLTF'S COUNSEL TO PREPARE AN ORDER.
